allow: PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime, @{Name='CmdLine';Expression={\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine}} | Format-List)

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count)
